name: Boom Stix Golf Club
about: Boom Stix Golf Club is an elite, members-only indoor golf facility located in Pleasant Grove, Utah. The venue provides the latest in golf simulator technology within a private, comfortable setting featuring two simulator bays. Members enjoy 24/7 access to the bays, with the ability to play golf, practice, or review statistics at their convenience. Access to the facility is managed through a custom app, and memberships also include access to a full fitness gym and other recreational amenities.
why_golfers_like_it: Exclusive 24/7 access to private golf simulator bays
State-of-the-art Trackman 4 technology for detailed performance tracking
On-site functional fitness gym available with membership
Access to worldwide and local golf leagues and tournaments

food_and_drink.notes: No food service is mentioned; bring your own food.
No alcohol service is mentioned; this is a private members-only club.

simulator_hardware.notes: Each bay features a Trackman 4 simulator with 16 ft screens and 4K clarity.

faq.question: Do I need my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you must bring your own clubs to use the simulators.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, you can bring your own food and drinks, as no food or beverage service is provided.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time to play 18 holes is not specified, but players can access the bays 24/7 and sessions can be reserved online or via the app.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The venue is marketed as an exclusive adult environment focused on golf and fitness and is not promoted as a family or kid-friendly facility.
